productName: A.C. Diamond Stix Joint - Super Boof - 1g (H)
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Super Boof, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
